prose:
Computed property: frontier-orbital energies (HOMO, LUMO) and HOMO–LUMO gap of TEMPO.

Method provenance
• Property: frontier-orbital energies and HOMO–LUMO gap (eV)
• Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard`  (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF v?.
• Geometry provenance: user-supplied Cartesian coordinates from “/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz”; single-point calculation (no further relaxation).
• Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation model).
• Charge 0, multiplicity 2 (open-shell UDFT).
• SCF convergence: converged in 12 cycles; gradient not applicable (single point).
• Warnings: no warnings reported by the engine.
• Live log: the PySCF stdout/stderr was streamed during the run to a file named in the working directory following chemkit convention (e.g. frontier_YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.out). Result JSON saved at /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpvnk62nfy/live.json (see cli_invocation).

Key results (gas-phase, energies in eV)
• HOMO energy (α): −6.3375439 eV
• LUMO energy: −2.4651235 eV
• HOMO–LUMO gap: 3.8724203 eV  ← headline value returned by tool

No experimental comparison is provided (not requested).
